title: OpenRouter 推出 Fusion API 复合模型，半价达 Fable 级智能
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
elvis
@omarsar0
Even more data to support what I have been talking about. The combination of model intelligence (and this includes human expertise) has a compounding effect unlike anything I've seen.
There are too many assumptions that a large general-purpose model will be a one-size-fits-all. I don't buy it. The reality, and the research supports this, is that these different models show different strengths and capabilities.
Understanding how to tap into them in combination is a huge unlock. All engineering teams need to be thinking about this more carefully as a strategy going forward. Especially now, given the trends from frontier models in terms of selective access.
OpenRouter
@OpenRouter
14h
Introducing the Fusion API, the smartest compound model in the market.
Fusion achieves Fable-level intelligence at half the price.
How it works 👇
7:13 PM · Jun 13, 2026 18K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: OpenRouter 推出 Fusion API 复合模型，半价达 Fable 级智能
discovery_record.discovery_summary: OpenRouter 发布 Fusion API，号称"市场上最智能的复合模型"，能以一半的价格达到 Fable 级别的智能。主推文作者 Elvis Saravia 借此观点指出，模型智能与人类专业知识的组合具有惊人的复合效应，不同模型各有独特优势，而非通用大模型能一统天下。工程团队应将"组合调用不同模型"作为战略方向，尤其在前沿模型选择性开放的趋势下，理解如何协同利用它们将是巨大的解锁。

key_excerpts.text: OpenRouter 发布 Fusion API，号称"市场上最智能的复合模型"，能以一半的价格达到 Fable 级别的智能。主推文作者 Elvis Saravia 借此观点指出，模型智能与人类专业知识的组合具有惊人的复合效应，不同模型各有独特优势，而非通用大模型能一统天下。工程团队应将"组合调用不同模型"作为战略方向，尤其在前沿模型选择性开放的趋势下，理解如何协同利用它们将是巨大的解锁。
Post Log in Sign up Post elvis @omarsar0 Even more data to support what I have been talking about.
The combination of model intelligence (and this includes human expertise) has a compounding effect unlike anything I've seen.
There are too many assumptions that a large general-purpose model will be a one-size-fits-all.
The reality, and the research supports this, is that these different models show different strengths and capabilities.
Understanding how to tap into them in combination is a huge unlock.
